name: Red Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare and core the apples.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, salt, and red cinnamon candy with water. Stir until the candy is fully dissolved.
3. Place the saucepan over low heat and cook the mixture gently, stirring occasionally, until it begins to simmer.
4. Add the apples to the syrup and cover the pan. Cook the apples slowly in the syrup until they are just tender, turning them occasionally to ensure even cooking.
5. Remove from heat and drain any excess liquid.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the cottage cheese and chopped green pepper.
7. Stuff each apple with the cottage cheese mixture.
8. Serve chilled on watercress or other dark greens.
